//: Per-agent sentinel (L2/L3) config — independent of the L1 plugin config. The installer (adapters/install-sentinel.sh) fills stateDir with the agent's own events dir so L1 + L2/L3 show up in THAT agent's WebUI.

nativeJudge.//: mode: observe = detect+log+WebUI, never block | enforce = let lsm deny in-kernel

probes.//: ebpf/uprobe = observe only; lsm = in-kernel enforce (needs kernel >=5.7 + BTF + bpf in LSM list, and nativeJudge.mode=enforce)
